articles.title: Thinking Machines wants to build an AI that actually listens while it talks
articles.description: Right now, every AI model you've ever used works the same way. You talk, it listens. It responds, you listen. Thinking Machines is trying to change
articles.author: Connie Loizos

articles.title: Riding an AI rally, Robinhood preps second retail venture IPO
articles.description: Robinhood files confidentially for its second venture fund, this time targeting growth and early-stage startups.
articles.author: Marina Temkin
